name: project-tixmo
description: Root dev helpers for the Tixmo dashboard and API

scripts.dev:services: docker compose -f tixmoapi2/docker-compose.yml up -d || docker-compose -f tixmoapi2/docker-compose.yml up -d
scripts.dev:services:down: docker compose -f tixmoapi2/docker-compose.yml down || docker-compose -f tixmoapi2/docker-compose.yml down
